headline: How The U.S. Bancorp (USB) Narrative Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Price Targets
summary: The fair value estimate for U.S. Bancorp has been adjusted to $62.95 from $62.55, a small shift that still reflects a refined view of what the shares might be worth under updated assumptions. Around that core move, price targets across the Street are also moving both higher and lower as different firms weigh earnings execution, risk management, and valuation support in their own models. Read on to see what is driving these changes and how you can track the evolving analyst narrative around...
